title: beta vulgaris var. orientalis
intro: Beta vulgaris var. orientalis, commonly known as red beets or sugar beets, is a variant of the beet plant that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, due to its high content of antioxidants and fiber. The health benefits of Beta vulgaris var. orientalis include lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and reducing the risk of certain cancers. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into juices, teas, and powders, which can be used to support overall health and wellness, and are also used in traditional medicine to treat various conditions.
